welcome_back: Welcome back. How can we help you today?
tagline: We help you get doctor advice and medical help quickly, even without internet.
join_thousands: Join thousands of ASHA workers, doctors, and citizens building the future of comprehensive healthcare infrastructure.
footer_text: © 2026 SwasthAI Healthcare Platform. All Rights Reserved. IEEE Certified.

services.maternal_desc: Access discrete clinical guidance, track menstrual cycles, and receive dedicated maternal support.
services.symptoms_desc: Check your illness using our smart tool.
services.how_feeling: Tell us how you are feeling:
services.ambulance_desc: Need urgent medical help? Request an ambulance or alert a local ASHA worker immediately.
services.tele_desc: Talk to city doctors instantly through video calls.
services.academy_desc: Learn how to stay healthy and prevent illness.
services.voice_desc: No need to type, just speak and get help.

nav.offline_desc: Symptom Checker works. Voice & AI need internet.

loginPage.left_desc: Securely access your medical records, consult with professionals, and request emergency assistance in your local language.
loginPage.secure_desc: All health data is protected under robust clinical encryption protocols and only accessible by authorized healthcare providers.
loginPage.sign_in_desc: Please sign in to access your dashboard.

registerPage.left_desc: Create an account to securely book appointments, chat with specialists, and track your family's vital records in real-time.
registerPage.national_desc: All user profiles are authenticated according to national privacy guidelines to ensure a zero-tolerance policy against data breaches.
registerPage.set_up_account: Set up your account to access all clinical services.
registerPage.account_created: Account Created Successfully! Redirecting to login...

diseaseChecker.title: Health
diseaseChecker.describe_voice: Or describe health condition in local language...
diseaseChecker.mild_msg: Based on our check, your condition does not look serious.
diseaseChecker.mild_advice: Rest for 24 hours. If you still feel bad, see an ASHA worker.
diseaseChecker.severe_msg: Warning: Your symptoms look serious. You need to see a doctor now.
diseaseChecker.severe_advice: Please go to the nearest hospital immediately. We have sent an alert to help you.
diseaseChecker.skin_mild_msg: This looks like a common skin infection.
diseaseChecker.skin_severe_msg: Advanced pattern mismatch found. Potential severe skin infection or an allergic reaction.
diseaseChecker.scanner_desc: Upload a clear clinical-view photo for instant AI analysis and diagnostic mapping.
diseaseChecker.privacy_desc: Image data remains local. Neural processing is localized to your regional node.
diseaseChecker.processing_img: Photo is analyzed for redness & inflammation
diseaseChecker.drag_drop: Or drag & drop a photo here
diseaseChecker.privacy_main: Your photo stays private — analyzed only on this device
diseaseChecker.privacy_sub: Your photo is not sent to anyone.
diseaseChecker.duration_q: How long have you had this?
diseaseChecker.spreading_q: Is it spreading to other areas?
diseaseChecker.res_urgent_advice: The photo shows signs of skin inflammation. Please visit your nearest primary health centre immediately.
diseaseChecker.res_moderate_advice: The photo shows some skin changes that need attention. Visit your nearby PHC or ASHA worker within 2-3 days.
diseaseChecker.res_mild_advice: Keep the area clean and dry. If it does not improve in 3-4 days, please see an ASHA worker.

villagerDashboard.decentralized_health: Decentralized Healthcare. Verified Identity. Seamless Care.
villagerDashboard.skin_scanner_desc: Upload photos to check for skin infections or rashes with Deep Learning.
villagerDashboard.health_identity_desc: Manage your clinical history, Health ID, and secure device nodes.
villagerDashboard.voice_assistant_desc: Just speak to the app in your language. No typing needed at all!

footer.description: Bridging the critical healthcare gap in rural India. SwasthAI Guardian leverages AI and local health networks to provide instant diagnostics and emergency support to every village.
footer.copyright: © 2026 SwasthAI Guardian. A mission to modernize rural healthcare through AI innovation.

intro.service_1_d: Tell us how you feel and get instant advice.
intro.service_2_d: Take a photo to check for skin infections.
intro.service_3_d: Get an ambulance to your village quickly.
intro.service_4_d: Track pregnancy and keep mothers safe.
intro.service_5_d: Check if your child is growing healthy and strong.
intro.service_6_d: Manage emergency calls and village records.
intro.strategic_desc: Fast doctor advice and emergency help for every village.

dashboardExt.profile_desc: View your health ID, update your name and village.
dashboardExt.symptom_checker_desc: Check your symptoms and get advice.
dashboardExt.greeting: Hello, how can we help you today?

menstrual.title: Women's Health
menstrual.subtitle: AI-powered health guidance, symptom checking, and free pad access - completely private and confidential.
menstrual.request_pads_desc: Your ASHA worker will deliver pads privately to your location. This request is completely confidential.
menstrual.private_note: 100% Private — Only your assigned ASHA worker can see this request. No one else will know.
menstrual.request_sent_desc: Your ASHA worker has been notified and will contact you shortly.
menstrual.symptom_desc: Select any symptoms you are currently experiencing. This is not a diagnosis - always consult a doctor for medical advice.
menstrual.tips_desc: Simple, proven advice for your health and wellbeing during your period.
menstrual.ask_anything: Ask me anything about your health...
menstrual.emergency_desc: Press the button below to immediately alert your ASHA worker. She will call you and come to help.
menstrual.offline_pad_help: No Internet? Please tell your ASHA worker directly if you need pads immediately.
menstrual.sakhi_offline_help: I could not process your question right now. Please try again, or contact your ASHA worker for immediate help.
menstrual.voice_not_supported: Voice input is not supported on this device. Please type your message.
menstrual.severe_symptom_msg: These symptoms could be serious. Please call 108 (Free Ambulance) or find your ASHA worker immediately.
menstrual.warning_symptom_msg: These symptoms should be discussed with your ASHA worker today.
menstrual.safe_symptom_msg: No urgent symptoms. Remember to rest and drink plenty of water.
menstrual.q_irregular_sub: Cycle shorter than 21 or longer than 35 days
menstrual.cycle_desc: Track your periods to know when your next one is coming so you can be prepared.

ambulance.title: Emergency Rescue
ambulance.subtitle: Need an ambulance or health responder? Click below. Your location is automatically shared.
ambulance.sos_desc: Press this button. We will use your phone's GPS to find you and dispatch the nearest ambulance instantly.

symptom.title: AI Symptom Checker
symptom.subtitle: Tell us how you feel. We will guide you on what to do next.
symptom.describe_desc: Speak or type in Hindi, English, or your local language — auto-detected.
